item.title: Personal Assistant Executive
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Reporting To: Managing Director Employment Type: Full-time Skills: problem-solving skills, excellent communication, multitasking abilities, and discretion in handling sensitive information, […]

The post Personal Assistant Executive first appeared on GreenSpace.
item.content:encoded:
Reporting To: Managing Director

Employment Type: Full-time

Skills: problem-solving skills, excellent communication, multitasking abilities, and discretion in handling sensitive information, Manage and maintain executive schedules, calendars, and appointments.

Job Description

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Personal Assistant Executive to provide comprehensive administrative and executive support to senior management. The role requires excellent communication, multitasking abilities, and discretion in handling sensitive information.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage and maintain executive schedules, calendars, and appointments.
  • Coordinate and arrange meetings, conferences, and travel itineraries.
  • Draft, review, and manage correspondence, emails, and official communications.
  • Prepare reports, presentations, and documentation as required.
  • Handle confidential and sensitive information with utmost integrity.
  • Act as the primary point of contact between executives and internal/external
    stakeholders.
  • Assist in monitoring deadlines, tasks, and follow-ups to ensure smooth workflow.
  • Support executives in personal tasks, including travel, event coordination, and
    errands, when required.
  • Maintain filing systems (electronic and physical) for efficient document
    management.
  • Perform other administrative and support duties as assigned by management.

Education:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration/Commerce/Arts or related field.

Experience:

  • Proven experience (2–5 years) as a Personal Assistant, Executive Assistant, or similar
    role.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Strong organizational, time management, and multitasking abilities.
  • Proficiency in MS Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and digital collaboration
    tools.
  • Ability to work independently and handle pressure in a fast-paced environment.
  • High level of professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality.

Additional Skills:

  • Positive attitude with problem-solving skills.
  • Attention to detail and ability to anticipate needs.
  • Flexible and adaptable to changing priorities.
  • Strong interpersonal skills for effective interaction with internal teams and external
    partners.
  • Compensation & Benefits
  • Competitive salary as per industry standards.
  • Opportunities for career growth and professional development.
  • Supportive and collaborative work environment.

Location:

Greenspace – 4th Floor
Unit No. 0401N, 4th Floor, No. 11/1-4, Beacon Tower-2,
BRIGADE TWIN TOWERS, Jai Bharath Industries Pipeline Road,
Yeshwanthpur, Bengaluru – 560022 https://g.co/kgs/skHExCb

** Interested candidates can share their Resume to hr@greenspaceherbs.com to apply with the subject line: Application for Personal Assistant Executive **

The post Personal Assistant Executive first appeared on GreenSpace.

item.title: Pharmacology/Pharmacognist
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Department: Research & Development / Pharmacology Qualification: M.Pharm (Pharmacology) Experience: 5–10 years (can be adjusted) Reporting To: Chief of R&D. […]

The post Pharmacology/Pharmacognist first appeared on GreenSpace.
item.content:encoded:
Department: Research & Development / Pharmacology
Qualification: M.Pharm (Pharmacology)
Experience: 5–10 years (can be adjusted)
Reporting To: Chief of R&D.
Location: Lakkenahalli Village, Solur Hobli, Magadi Talik, Ramangar dist – 562127.


Job Summary

We are seeking a qualified and motivated M.Pharm (Pharmacology) professional to support pharmacological research, preclinical studies, and scientific documentation. The role involves experimental planning, data analysis, literature review, and compliance with regulatory and ethical standards.

Key Responsibilities

  • Conduct pharmacological and preclinical studies (in vitro and/or in vivo) as per study protocols
  • Assist in study design, execution, and interpretation of results
  • Perform data collection, statistical analysis, and report preparation
  • Review and compile scientific literature related to drugs, APIs, herbal products, or formulations
  • Prepare and maintain study reports, SOPs, protocols, and documentation
  • Ensure compliance with GLP, GCP, and ethical guidelines
  • Support regulatory submissions and responses, if required
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams such as R&D, QA, Regulatory Affairs, and Clinical teams
  • Maintain laboratory instruments, records, and safety standards

Required Skills & Knowledge

  • Strong understanding of pharmacodynamics and pharmacokinetics
  • Knowledge of drug screening, toxicity studies, and safety pharmacology
  • Familiarity with GLP/GCP guidelines
  • Ability to analyze data and prepare technical and scientific reports
  • Good knowledge of research methodologies and statistics
  • Proficiency in MS Office and basic data analysis tools
  • Good communication and documentation skills

Preferred Skills (Added Advantage)

  • Experience in animal handling and experimental models
  • Exposure to herbal / nutraceutical / pharmaceutical research
  • Knowledge of regulatory requirements (ICH, CDSCO, US FDA – basic)

Interested candidates can share their resumes at madhu_hr@greenspaceherbs.com . Interested candidates can contact: +91 9035185216

The post Pharmacology/Pharmacognist first appeared on GreenSpace.

item.title: Personal Assistant to Managing Director.
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Experience: 8-10 Years. Location: Corporate Office – Yeshwanthpur. Department: Executive Office. Reporting To: Managing Director. Job Summary: We are seeking a highly organized and […]

The post Personal Assistant to Managing Director. first appeared on GreenSpace.
item.content:encoded:
Experience: 8-10 Years.
Location: Corporate Office – Yeshwanthpur.
Department: Executive Office.
Reporting To: Managing Director.

Job Summary:

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Personal Assistant to the Managing Director who will provide high-level administrative and executive support. The role involves managing schedules, coordinating meetings, handling confidential information, and ensuring smooth communication between the MD and internal/external stakeholders.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage the Managing Directors calendar, appointments, and daily schedule efficiently.
  • Coordinate meetings, conferences, and travel arrangements(domestic and international).
  • Prepare reports, presentations, and business correspondenceon behalf of the MD.
  • Handle confidential documents and sensitive informationwith discretion.
  • Act as a point of contactbetween the MD and internal departments or external partners.
  • Maintain records, files, and documentationrelated to executive activities.
  • Track important tasks, follow-ups, and deadlinesfor the MD.
  • Organize board meetings, management meetings, and minutes of meetings (MOM).
  • Screen phone calls, emails, and other communications for the MD.
  • Assist in planning events, business meetings, and official visit.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, or related field.
  • 58 years of experienceas a Personal Assistant, Executive Assistant, or similar role supporting senior leadership.
  • Strong organizational and time management skills.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
  • Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word, Outlook).
  • Ability to handle confidential information with integrity.
  • Strong multitasking and problem-solving skills.
  • Professional etiquette and presentation skills.

Preferred Skills:

  • Experience working with senior executives / CXO level leadership.
  • Good coordination and follow-up skills.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced corporate environment.

Interested candidates can share their resumes at madhu_hr@greenspaceherbs.com. Interested candidates can contact: +91 9035185216

The post Personal Assistant to Managing Director. first appeared on GreenSpace.

item.title: General Manager Sales & Marketing (Personal Care Division).
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Department: Sales & Marketing Experience: 20+ years Location: Corporate Office Reports To: Managing Director / Chief of R&D. Position Overview: […]

The post General Manager Sales & Marketing (Personal Care Division). first appeared on GreenSpace.
item.content:encoded:
Department: Sales & Marketing
Experience: 20+ years
Location: Corporate Office
Reports To: Managing Director / Chief of R&D.

Position Overview:

We are looking for a strategic and result-oriented General Manager Sales & Marketing to lead our Personal Care product division. The role involves driving revenue growth, expanding market presence, strengthening brand positioning, and building a high-performing sales and marketing team across domestic and international markets.

Role & responsibilities:

Key Responsibilities:

1. Business Strategy & Revenue Planning:

  • Design and implement long-term and short-term sales strategies aligned with organizational goals.
  • Develop annual operating plans including revenue projections, sales forecasting, and budget allocation.
  • Define monthly, quarterly, and yearly sales targets and ensure structured tracking mechanisms.
  • Identify high-growth markets, new geographies, and emerging consumer segments.

2. B2B & B2C Market Expansion:

  • Drive B2B business through distributors, institutional sales, contract manufacturing partnerships, and bulk buyers.
  • Expand B2C presence across retail chains, modern trade, general trade, and e-commerce platforms.
  • Strengthen export sales and international distribution networks.
  • Develop customized commercial models for different sales channels.

3. Sales Operations & Performance Management:

  • Lead nationwide sales operations ensuring target achievement and profitability.
  • Monitor primary and secondary sales performance with structured review systems.
  • Optimize pricing frameworks, margin structures, and trade schemes.
  • Ensure disciplined sales MIS reporting and performance analytics.

4. Brand Strategy & Market Positioning:

  • Establish strong brand identity and differentiated positioning in the personal care segment.
  • Direct new product launches including go-to-market strategies.
  • Oversee packaging development and ensure market-aligned presentation standards.

5. Key Account & Commercial Management:

  • Develop strategic relationships with major retail chains, distributors, and online marketplaces.
  • Lead commercial negotiations and finalize high-value contracts.
  • Strengthen trade marketing execution and in-store visibility programs.

6. Demand Planning & Cross-Functional Integration:

  • Align sales forecasts with production and supply chain planning to ensure optimal inventory levels.
  • Collaborate with R&D and QA/QC for product performance enhancements and regulatory alignment.
  • Ensure smooth coordination between finance and sales for budget control and profitability tracking.

7. Leadership & Organizational Development:

  • Build, mentor, and scale a high-performing sales and marketing team.
  • Establish measurable KPIs and conduct structured performance evaluations.

Preferred candidate profile

Qualifications:

  • MBA in Marketing / Sales / Business Administration (Preferred).
  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or related discipline Experience:
  • 20+ years of progressive experience in Sales & Marketing
  • At least 5 years in a senior leadership capacity
  • Mandatory exposure to Personal Care / FMCG / Cosmetics / Consumer Products sector (Herbal industry preferred).

Interested candidates can share their resumes at madhu_hr@greenspaceherbs.com Interested candidates can contact: +91 9035185216

The post General Manager Sales & Marketing (Personal Care Division). first appeared on GreenSpace.

item.title: Chief Executive Officer (CEO)
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Experience: 20+ Years Location: Corporate Office – Yeshwanthpur, Bangalore. Reports To: Managing Director Position Overview: We are seeking a visionary […]

The post Chief Executive Officer (CEO) first appeared on GreenSpace.
item.content:encoded:
Experience: 20+ Years

Location: Corporate Office – Yeshwanthpur, Bangalore.
Reports To: Managing Director

Position Overview:

We are seeking a visionary and results-driven Chief Executive Officer (CEO) with extensive experience across Sales & Marketing, Manufacturing, Production, New Product Development (NPD), and Quality Assurance & Quality Control (QA/QC).

The CEO will be responsible for leading the organization’s overall strategic direction, operational excellence, revenue growth, regulatory compliance, and sustainable expansion within the FMCG, Personal Care, Herbal, and Nutraceutical sectors.

This role requires a dynamic leader capable of integrating commercial strategy with manufacturing efficiency, innovation, and quality systems to drive long-term profitability and brand leadership.

Key Responsibilities:

Strategic Leadership & Corporate Governance

  • Define and execute the company’s long-term vision, mission, and growth roadmap.
  • Develop corporate strategies aligned with market opportunities and industry trends.
  • Ensure strong governance, risk management, and ethical business practices.
  • Represent the organization before investors, regulatory bodies, and key stakeholders.

Revenue Growth & Market Expansion

  • Drive domestic and international business growth across B2B and B2C channels.
  • Oversee sales forecasting, revenue planning, and profitability targets.
  • Strengthen brand positioning and competitive market presence.
  • Expand distribution networks, exports, and strategic alliances.

Manufacturing & Operational Excellence

  • Oversee end-to-end manufacturing operations ensuring productivity, cost efficiency, and scalability.
  • Optimize production planning, capacity utilization, and supply chain integration.
  • Implement best practices in operational efficiency and continuous improvement.
  • Ensure adherence to GMP, ISO, HACCP, and relevant regulatory standards.

Product Innovation & Development

  • Lead New Product Development (NPD) strategies aligned with consumer trends and regulatory requirements.
  • Drive innovation in formulation, packaging, and product differentiation.
  • Ensure successful commercialization and go-to-market execution.

Quality & Regulatory Oversight

  • Ensure robust QA/QC systems across manufacturing and product lifecycle.
  • Maintain compliance with national and international regulatory frameworks.
  • Uphold product safety, efficacy, and brand reputation through strict quality governance.

Financial & Profit & Loss Management

  • Own overall Profit & Loss responsibility and financial performance.
  • Oversee budgeting, cost control, capital expenditure, and investment planning.
  • Drive sustainable profitability and shareholder value creation.

Organizational Leadership & Culture Building

  • Build and mentor a high-performing leadership team.
  • Foster a culture of accountability, innovation, and operational excellence.
  • Develop succession planning and leadership pipeline strategies.

Qualifications

  • MBA / Postgraduate degree in Business Administration, Operations, or related field.
  • Technical background (Pharmacy / Life Sciences / Engineering) preferred.
  • Executive leadership certifications is an added advantage.

Experience

  • 20+ years of progressive leadership experience.
  • Proven track record in FMCG, Personal Care, Herbal, Nutraceutical, or related industries.
  • Strong exposure to Sales & Marketing, Manufacturing, Production, NPD, and QA/QC.
  • Experience managing multi-functional teams and large-scale operations.

Core Competencies

  • Strategic vision and business transformation
  • Revenue growth and market penetration expertise
  • Manufacturing and operational leadership
  • Product innovation and commercialization
  • Regulatory compliance and quality governance
  • Financial acumen and Profit & Loss ownership
  • Strong negotiation and stakeholder management skills
  • Change management and organizational development

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • Revenue growth and EBITDA (Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortisation) performance
  • Market share expansion
  • Operational efficiency and cost optimization
  • Successful product launches
  • Regulatory compliance record

Interested candidates can share their resumes at madhu_hr@greenspaceherbs.com
Interested candidates can contact: +91 9035185216

The post Chief Executive Officer (CEO) first appeared on GreenSpace.
